title: Non Stick Cooking Pots with Glass Lid – 4.2 Quart Induction Hob Stock Pot – Kitchen Deep Casserole Cookware – 24cm, Marble – by Nuovva
features: DURABLE DESIGN: Crafted from high quality materials, this 24cm stockpot by Nuovva offers excellent heat conductivity and long-lasting durability. The heavy-duty base ensures even cooking, minimizing hotspots for better results. Built to withstand daily use, it's ideal for both home cooks and professionals!

ELEGANT MARBLE FINISH: Featuring a stylish marble exterior, our stockpot brings a modern, sophisticated look to your kitchen. The unique design makes it attractive enough to go from stove to table with ease. It complements any kitchen decor while offering practical performance!

NON-STICK COATING: The interior is coated with a PFOA-free non-stick layer that allows food to release effortlessly. Cooking and cleaning are a breeze, no more stuck-on messes! This coating also means you can use less oil, supporting healthier meals!

VERSATILE USES: With a generous 24cm size, this stockpot is perfect for soups, stews, pastas, and large family meals. It’s deep enough for boiling, braising, or slow simmering with plenty of room to stir. Whether you are meal prepping or cooking for guests, it delivers ample volume!

INDUCTION READY: Compatible with all stovetops, including induction, this stockpot by Nuovva includes a tempered glass lid with steam vent that helps you monitor food without lifting the cover. When you're done, just toss it in the dishwasher for hassle-free cleanup!
description: Product Description Upgrade your kitchen with NUOVVA’s durable non-stick casserole pots.
